title: Claims
description: Active task leases. Each claim ties one run_id to one task_ref + agent_id for a bounded time window.

RunId.description: Unique ID for one execution attempt of a claimed task. New run_id on every claim, including retries.

ClaimState.description: State of this specific run. 'done'/'failed' are terminal — claim is removed on next compaction.

FinalizationState.description: Coordinator-owned finalization phase after implementation work is complete.

lease_expires_at.description: Absolute expiry timestamp. Coordinator auto-requeues or marks blocked after this passes.

task_envelope_sent_at.description: Timestamp when the coordinator successfully delivered TASK_START into the worker PTY session.

last_heartbeat_at.description: Timestamp of last heartbeat for this run. Null if no heartbeat received yet.

failure_reason.description: Human-readable failure summary when state is 'failed'.

finalization_state.description: Non-terminal finalization phase once implementation work is complete.

finalization_retry_count.description: Number of finalize rebase attempts requested for this run.

finalization_blocked_reason.description: Coordinator-provided reason when finalization is blocked after retries.

input_state.description: Non-terminal worker wait state while the coordinator/master must provide additional input.

input_requested_at.description: Timestamp of the latest unresolved input request for this run.

session_start_retry_count.description: Number of managed-slot session start attempts recorded for this claimed run.

session_start_retry_next_at.description: Coordinator-owned next retry timestamp for a managed-slot session start.

session_start_last_error.description: Most recent managed-slot session start failure reason for this claimed run.

escalation_notified_at.description: Timestamp when coordinator last emitted a worker_needs_attention notification for this run.
